description:
Debug Line is a ProtoFlux node that creates a line going between Point0 to Point1 in global space. The visual will appear under the Root of a world. In most cases, the debug visuals will be drawn over most materials, letting you see them easily.

This is useful for Vector debugging.

See also: Coordinate spaces

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Create the Line debug visual with the given parameters.
fields.Point0: The first point of the line visual in global space.
fields.Point1: The second point of the line visual in global space.
fields.Color: The color the visual should be.
fields.Radius: The distance from the center line to the outside edge in meters.
fields.Duration: How long the visual should appear in seconds.
fields.Next: Fires after * (Call) has been called and the visual was created.
